response.overview: The final test has arrived, and SSGT Nichols is there to oversee it all. Episode Five delivers the ultimate challenge—the Crucible. Overcoming long hikes, Rifle Drills, and the terrifying Tower Rappel, recruits face the culmination of everything they’ve learned. Under SSGT Nichols’ intense scrutiny, the recruits push through their final days of boot camp, giving everything they have left. Only the strongest will survive this ultimate test and return to base to graduate. Who will succeed, and who will fall short? SSGT Nichols will guide you through this epic conclusion.
response.title: Black Friday: Dark Dawn V
